name: vibespec
description: VibeSpec is a free, open-source AI product-planning plugin for Claude and Codex. It turns product ideas into editable SOTs with PRDs, feature specs, IA, and user flows. Official site: https://vbspec.com/.

interface.shortDescription: Free AI product planning for Claude and Codex.
interface.longDescription: VibeSpec is a free, open-source AI product-planning plugin for Claude and Codex. It turns product ideas into editable SOTs with PRDs, feature specs, IA, and user flows, plus a self-contained HTML viewer. Official site: https://vbspec.com/.
defaultPrompt: Turn my product idea into a validated VibeSpec SOT and HTML viewer.
Create a PRD, feature spec, IA, and user flow from this document.
Review this VibeSpec SOT and fix its validation or coverage issues.
